elements.sent-2411-001: We obtain new controls for the Leray solutions $u$ of the incompressible Navier-Stokes equation in $\R^3$.
elements.sent-2411-002: Specifically, we estimate $u$, $\nabla u$, and $\nabla^2 u$ in suitable Lebesgue spaces $L^{\tilde r _TL^r$, $r <+ \infty$ with some constraints on $\tilde r>0$.}
elements.sent-2411-003: Our method is based on a Duhamel formula around a perturbed heat equation, allowing to thoroughly exploit the well-known energy estimates which balances the potential singularities.
elements.sent-2411-004: We also perform a new Bihari-LaSalle argument in this context.
